description: High fashion styling and leather uppers up the style quotient of the humble sneaker, in these id shoes. Comes with a spare set of laces. Wear this with classic slim Fit denims and a tonal monochrome tee. Upper Leather upper for maximum durability and style Overlay at the heel collar and toe box Brabding embossed on the mifdoot area Lace-up system for a snug, customised fit Lightly padded tongue and collar for a great snug fit Mesh lining Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life Cushioned footbed for added comfort Midsole EVA midsole for comfort and support Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant grooved rubber outsole for better shock absorption with an upraised heel Shoe care Wipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a nubuck brush to clean the upper Do not store in direct sunlight
